_README: Local credential reference list used by credentials.py to tag competitors and
referral physicians with academy / board credentials that the NPI Registry does
not carry. ClinicSiteIntel NEVER queries the academy portals at runtime (their
terms of use forbid bulk extraction). You populate this file yourself from sources
you are permitted to use (a one-off lookup per provider, a licensed/partner feed,
or published board-diplomate lists), then the app fuzzy-matches your NPI/Google
providers against it by normalized name + state.
Each entry: { name, city, state (2-letter), credentials: [labels] }.
'ABOP Diplomate (Orofacial Pain)'   - American Board of Orofacial Pain
'AAOP Member (Orofacial Pain)'       - American Academy of Orofacial Pain
'AADSM (Dental Sleep Medicine)'      - AADSM Qualified Dentist / ABDSM Diplomate
'AASM (Sleep Medicine)'              - American Academy of Sleep Medicine
Delete this _README key in production if you prefer; the loader ignores it.
